nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: POST body: { user_id (uuid), client_id (text), client_email, report_type, report_month (YYYY-MM-DD) }

parameters.query: SELECT delivery_method, phone_number FROM user_notification_preferences WHERE user_id = NULLIF($1, 'null')::uuid LIMIT 1;

nodes.name: Code — Normalize Data
nodes.notes: Merges webhook body + DB prefs into one flat object

parameters.notes: Requires HTTP Header Auth credential pointing to your service-role key. Configure credential in n8n before activating.

nodes.name: Switch — Delivery Method
nodes.notes: Output 0 = email | Output 1 = sms | Output 2 = both (fans to Mailgun AND Vonage)

parameters.subject: =Your BFC {{$node["Code — Add Magic Link"].json["report_type"]}} Report is Ready
parameters.text:
=Hello,

Your BFC compliance report is ready to view:

{{$node["Code — Add Magic Link"].json["magic_link"]}}

This link expires in 30 minutes.

— BFC Compliance Team

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: =BFC: Your {{$node["Code — Add Magic Link"].json["report_type"]}} report is ready. View (expires 30 min): {{$node["Code — Add Magic Link"].json["magic_link"]}}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO report_delivery_log
  (client_id, client_email, report_type, report_month, report_url,
   magic_link_sent, magic_link_expires_at,
   email_sent, email_provider,
   sms_sent, sms_provider,
   status, failure_reason, n8n_execution_id)
VALUES
  ($1, $2, $3,
   NULLIF($4, 'null')::date,
   NULLIF($5, 'null'),
   $6::boolean, NULLIF($7, 'null')::timestamptz,
   $8::boolean, NULLIF($9, 'null'),
   $10::boolean, NULLIF($11, 'null'),
   $12, NULLIF($13, 'null'), NULLIF($14, 'null'))
RETURNING id;
